sections.title: Introduction
sections.text: 30-Day SDE + AI/ML Job Hunt Planner (With Timings & Breaks) Time Task

sections.title: 6:30 – 7:00 AM
sections.text: Morning setup: Review yesterday’s results, set targets

sections.title: 8:30 – 9:30 AM
sections.text: DSA Practice (2–3 problems: Arrays, Strings, Hashmaps, DP, Graphs)

sections.title: 9:30 – 10:15 AM
sections.text: AI/ML Theory (Daily topic: Overfitting, CNNs, Transformers, etc.)

sections.title: 9:00 – 10:00 PM
sections.text: LinkedIn Posting, Resume Tuning, Mock Interviews/Revision Week 1 – Foundation & Visibility Resume + LinkedIn optimization, start first project, daily applications. Week 2 – Skill Building + Bigger Project Finish small project, start larger one, deepen DSA/AI knowledge. Week 3 – Interview Sprint Projects finalized, mock interviews, advanced DSA & AI topics. Week 4 – Conversion Push Max applications, follow-ups, strong LinkedIn visibility, final revision.
